basic_details.job_title: NTPC Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 25 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 25 Engineer. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NTPC website, ntpc.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: NTPC Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise)

age_limit.age_details: Medical Examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer (decision is final and binding)

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 4 years of post-qualification (BE/B.Tech) executive experience (including training period, if any) in the Power/Oil/Gas/Steel sector.

selection_process: Multi-stage selection process (Application Shortlisting / Written Test / Personal Interview etc.)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the NTPC careers portal at https://careers.ntpc.co.in or through the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in. No other means/mode of application shall be accepted. Candidates are required to possess a valid email ID. NTPC will not be responsible for bouncing back any email sent to the candidates. After applying online, the candidate is required to download the application slip generated by the system with a unique application number. No document is required to be sent to NTPC by post.
seo_tags: National Thermal Power Corporation Engineer Recruitment 2026
